title: China Dismisses Claims of Ongoing Tariff Talks with US as Groundless

body: BI holds benchmark rate at 5.75%, citing stable inflation. BI also cuts 2025 global growth forecast to 2.9%, citing US tariffs.

title: Indonesia Begins 60-Day Trade Talks with US, Offers Commodity Imports for Tariff Relief
